name: aso-cultural-resort
description: A beautiful static homepage for Aso Cultural Resort - Experience traditional Japan in the volcanic wonderland of Mount Aso

scripts.build: echo 'Static HTML/CSS site - no build process required'
scripts.lint: echo 'Linting HTML and CSS files...' && npx htmlhint index.html && npx stylelint styles.css
scripts.deploy:github: git add . && git commit -m 'Deploy to GitHub Pages' && git push origin main

author: Aso Cultural Resort
